text:
Family (ファミリー, Famirī) is a song from the Hunter × Hunter: The Nightmare of Zaoldyeck, sung by Yasuhiro Kitano as Milluki Zoldyck, Miki Hazama as Illumi Zoldyck, Masashi Nitta as Zeno Zoldyck, Hiromi Setsu as Kikyo Zoldyck, Momo Nanase as Kalluto Zoldyck, and Ryuji Kasahara as Silva Zoldyck.

Lyrics
